name: Fudgey Peanut Butter Chip Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup HERSHEY'S Cocoa or European Style Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line muffin cups (2-1/2 inches in diameter) with paper baking cups.
3. In a small bowl, stir together applesauce and oats; set aside.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter, granulated sugar, brown sugar, egg, and vanilla until well blended.
5. Add the applesauce mixture; blend well.
6. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and cinnamon (if desired).
7. Add to butter mixture, blending well.
8. Stir in peanut butter chips.
9. Fill muffin cups 3/4 full with batter.
10. Bake for 22 to 26 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out almost clean.
11. Cool slightly in the pan on a wire rack.
12. Sprinkle muffin tops with powdered sugar (if desired).
13. Serve warm. Makes 12 to 15 muffins.
Variation: FUDGEY CHOCOLATE CHIP MUFFINS
Omit Peanut Butter Chips.
Add 1 cup HERHSEY'S Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips. Hershey's is a registered trademark of Hershey Foods Corporation. Recipe may be reprinted courtesy of the Hershey Kitchens.
